Reentrancy.description: Reentrancy vulnerability allows external calls to re-enter the contract before state changes are completed

Timestamp Dependency.description: Block timestamp dependency can be manipulated by miners

Integer Overflow/Underflow.description: Integer overflow/underflow in arithmetic operations (Note: Fixed in Solidity 0.8.0+)

Dangerous Delegatecall.description: Delegatecall to untrusted contract can lead to unexpected behavior

components.TimestampInvoc: Function invokes timestamp-related variables (now, block.timestamp, block.number)
components.TimestampAssign: Function assigns timestamp values to variables
components.TimestampContaminate: Timestamp is used in conditional operations or logic
